evals.expected_output: Runs fmt --check, cargo check, clippy with strict flags, and cargo test sequentially
assertions: Runs cargo clippy with pedantic and nursery warnings
Stops at first failure if any step fails

evals.prompt: Clippy is failing with unwrap_used, fix it
evals.expected_output: Identifies the unwrap call and replaces it with proper error handling using anyhow
assertions: Recognizes unwrap_used is a deny-level lint
Suggests using anyhow Result or proper error handling instead of unwrap
